channel.title: KOC Engine
channel.description: Making creator-brand collaboration accessible for everyone. AI-powered KOC matching platform with dual-pledge escrow for cross-border e-commerce.

item.title: Introducing KOC Engine — Creator-Brand Collaboration, Made Accessible
item.description: KOC Engine launches as the first AI-powered KOC matching platform with dual-pledge escrow for cross-border e-commerce. Built for Amazon sellers and DTC brands. No monthly fees — per-task pricing with built-in trust protection.
